page_title: Farewell, all Evangelion ~1214 Days of Hideaki Anno~
text:
(localized as Hideaki Anno: The Final Challenge of Evangelion) is a documentary about the production of Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It was directed by Aki Kubota and released on 29 April 2021 https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/20210813-2/ . There are three versions: a version with 75 minutes, a version with two episodes with 50 minutes each and a stitched version with 100 minutes.

Overview

The NHK crew followed Hideaki Anno and other khara staff's production for 1,214 days.

Producers: Tomoko Izuta, Tomohiko Yokoyama
Executive Producers: Daisaku Kawase, Keisuke Tsuchihashi, Kaku Arakawa
Produced by: NHK in association with NHK ENTERPRISES, INC. and in cooperation with Slow Hand Corporation
Special Thanks DAICON FILM

Trivia

It won the 2021 Asian Academy Creative awards national winner in the category for best documentary series. https://www.asianacademycreativeawards.com/2021-national-winners/
